details: Analyzing softcap operation: cap * tanh(x / cap). Component operations identified: division by parameter, tanh, multiplication by parameter
Read unary_op_utils.cpp - found limited operations: FRAC, SWISH, ATANH, SINH. Need to find more comprehensive operation list
Found comprehensive UnaryOpType enum with 127 operations including TANH, EXP, SIGMOID, parameterized ops like HARDTANH, SOFTSHRINK
Found only 4 SFPU kernels in wormhole_b0: swish, sinh, frac, atanh. Limited implementations available
Found tanh operations: atanh, hardtanh, tanhshrink. tanhshrink computes x - tanh(x) which includes tanh operation
Found 4 key SFPU ops: swish (x*sigmoid), tanhshrink (x-tanh), hardtanh/softshrink (parameterized). Need to examine more for division and parameterized ops
Created reference_selection.md with 5 operations: swish (multiplicative composition), tanhshrink (tanh usage), hardtanh (parameterized), atanh (SFPU structure), softshrink (param infrastructure)
